messages.content: 中译英：在2015年5月曾因企业与个人优秀杰出，荣登CCTV7（中央电视台财经频道） 《每日农经》和《致富经》节目选中，拍摄了《留学回国去养貂》专题节目，分享自己的致富之路以及养貂经验，是唯一一位同时受邀两个栏目组的嘉宾。

In May 2015, I was selected as a guest on the "Daily Agricultural Economics" and "Getting Rich" programs on CCTV7 (China Central Television's finance channel) because of my outstanding achievements as an individual and as a representative of a successful company. I was featured in a special segment titled "Returning to China after Studying Abroad to Raise Minks" where I shared my journey to prosperity and my experience in mink farming. It was a unique opportunity as I was the only guest invited by both program teams simultaneously.

润色如下内容：In May 2015, I was selected as a guest on the “Daily Agricultural Economics” and “Getting Rich” programs on CCTV7 (China Central Television’s finance channel) because of my outstanding achievements as an individual and as a representative of a successful company. I was featured in a special segment titled “Returning to China after Studying Abroad to Raise Minks” where I shared my journey to prosperity and my experience in mink farming. It was a unique opportunity as I was the only guest invited by both program teams simultaneously.

In May 2015, I had the honor of being chosen as a guest on both the "Daily Agricultural Economics" and "Getting Rich" programs aired on CCTV7, which is known as China Central Television's finance channel. The reason behind my selection was my exceptional accomplishments as an individual and as a representative of a successful company. I was invited to be a part of a special segment titled "Returning to China after Studying Abroad to Raise Minks," where I had the opportunity to share my personal journey to prosperity and impart my valuable experiences in mink farming. What made this experience even more remarkable was that I was the only guest who had the privilege of being invited by both program teams simultaneously.

中译英：中国皮毛信息网颁发的“2015 年度全国毛皮动物养殖业进口水貂育种基地”；
养殖创新奖：该奖项表彰在养殖行业中具有创新精神和创造力的企业和个人，包括针对水貂养殖方面的创新。

"National Import Mink Breeding Base for the Fur Animal Farming Industry" award presented by China Fur Information Network in 2015.

Innovation in Farming Award: This award recognizes companies and individuals who demonstrate innovative thinking and creativity in the farming industry, specifically in relation to mink farming.

润色如下内容：“National Import Mink Breeding Base for the Fur Animal Farming Industry” award presented by China Fur Information Network in 2015.

Innovation in Farming Award: This award recognizes companies and individuals who demonstrate innovative thinking and creativity in the farming industry, specifically in relation to mink farming.

"National Import Mink Breeding Base for the Fur Animal Farming Industry" award was conferred by China Fur Information Network in 2015.

The Innovation in Farming Award acknowledges enterprises and individuals who exhibit innovative thinking and creativity within the farming industry, particularly in the field of mink farming.
中译英：我计划前往香港发展貂皮出口事业，并在香港设立营销中心，了解市场需求，遵守出口规定和标准。寻找供应商和合作伙伴，建立从生产基地到香港营销中心的高效供应链管理模式，增强国际客户服务，通过香港打造出高度认知度和美誉度的品牌形象。

I am planning to develop the mink fur export business in Hong Kong and establish a marketing center there. My goal is to understand the market demand, comply with export regulations and standards, and seek out suppliers and partners. I aim to establish an efficient supply chain management model that connects the production base to the marketing center in Hong Kong. This will enhance international customer service and create a highly recognizable and reputable brand image through Hong Kong.

润色如下内容：I am planning to develop the mink fur export business in Hong Kong and establish a marketing center there. My goal is to understand the market demand, comply with export regulations and standards, and seek out suppliers and partners. I aim to establish an efficient supply chain management model that connects the production base to the marketing center in Hong Kong. This will enhance international customer service and create a highly recognizable and reputable brand image through Hong Kong.

I have a plan to expand my mink fur export business in Hong Kong and set up a marketing center there. The objective is to gain insights into the market demand, adhere to export regulations and standards, and identify suitable suppliers and partners. By establishing an efficient supply chain management system linking the production base with the marketing center in Hong Kong, I aim to enhance international customer service and build a brand image that is highly reputable and recognizable worldwide, leveraging the reputation and awareness associated with Hong Kong.
中译英：我在新加坡科廷教育中心就读期间的GPA为4.7，并于2011年8月获得澳大利亚科廷科技大学颁发的商学学士学位证书。此外，我还获得了学院的奖学金，以表彰我在专业领域的卓越表现。我也积极参与篮球运动，曾获得黑龙江省国家二级运动员称号。

During my studies at Curtin Education Centre Singapore, I achieved a GPA of 4.7. In August 2011, I was awarded a Bachelor's degree in Business Studies by Curtin University of Technology, Australia. Additionally, I received a scholarship from the institution in recognition of my outstanding performance in my field of study. I am also actively involved in basketball and have been honored with the title of National Second-Level Athlete in Heilongjiang Province.

润色如下内容：During my studies at Curtin Education Centre Singapore, I achieved a GPA of 4.7. In August 2011, I was awarded a Bachelor’s degree in Business Studies by Curtin University of Technology, Australia. Additionally, I received a scholarship from the institution in recognition of my outstanding performance in my field of study. I am also actively involved in basketball and have been honored with the title of National Second-Level Athlete in Heilongjiang Province.

During my time at Curtin Education Centre Singapore, I achieved an impressive GPA of 4.7. In August 2011, I proudly received my Bachelor's degree in Business Studies from Curtin University of Technology, Australia. My dedication and excellence in my field of study were acknowledged by the institution through the award of a scholarship. Alongside my academic pursuits, I actively partake in basketball and have been recognized with the esteemed title of National Second-Level Athlete in Heilongjiang Province.
中译英：针对水貂养殖和衍生产业链中的复杂物流需求，我将通过数据分析和预测，优化物流方案和资源配置，各环节设计物流方案，从而提高产业链整体的效益。在香港建立的水貂产业链能够带来更多的就业机会和税收收入，带动香港经济的发展。

In order to address the complex logistics requirements of mink farming and its related value chain, my approach will involve leveraging data analysis and forecasting techniques to optimize logistics schemes and resource allocation. Each link of the value chain will be meticulously designed with tailored logistics strategies, ultimately enhancing the overall efficiency of the industry chain. The establishment of a mink industry chain in Hong Kong not only brings about increased employment opportunities and tax revenue but also facilitates the economic development of Hong Kong as a whole.

润色如下内容：In order to address the complex logistics requirements of mink farming and its related value chain, my approach will involve leveraging data analysis and forecasting techniques to optimize logistics schemes and resource allocation. Each link of the value chain will be meticulously designed with tailored logistics strategies, ultimately enhancing the overall efficiency of the industry chain. The establishment of a mink industry chain in Hong Kong not only brings about increased employment opportunities and tax revenue but also facilitates the economic development of Hong Kong as a whole.

To meet the intricate logistics demands of mink farming and its associated value chain, my strategy entails utilizing data analysis and forecasting techniques to optimize logistics schemes and resource allocation. By carefully designing logistics strategies for each link in the value chain, I aim to enhance the overall efficiency of the industry. The establishment of a mink industry chain in Hong Kong will not only create more job opportunities and generate tax revenue but also contribute to the overall economic development of the region.
中译英：我于2010年新加坡科廷教育中心物流管理专业毕业后回国，从事一个完全陌生的行业--养水貂。第一年创业，就赚了400多万元，此后不断探索水貂养殖业和衍生产业链，在2014年销售额成功做到1300多万，目前公司已在深圳前海挂牌新四板（挂牌代码：681261）。

After graduating from Curtin Education Centre Singapore with a major in Logistics Management in 2010, I returned to my home country and ventured into a completely unfamiliar industry - mink farming. In my first year as an entrepreneur, I managed to earn over 4 million yuan. Since then, I have continuously explored the mink farming industry and its associated value chain. By 2014, our annual sales surpassed 13 million yuan. Currently, our company is listed on the New Fourth Board in Qianhai, Shenzhen (Listing code: 681261).

润色如下内容：After graduating from Curtin Education Centre Singapore with a major in Logistics Management in 2010, I returned to my home country and ventured into a completely unfamiliar industry - mink farming. In my first year as an entrepreneur, I managed to earn over 4 million yuan. Since then, I have continuously explored the mink farming industry and its associated value chain. By 2014, our annual sales surpassed 13 million yuan. Currently, our company is listed on the New Fourth Board in Qianhai, Shenzhen (Listing code: 681261).

After completing my studies in Logistics Management at Curtin Education Centre Singapore in 2010, I made the bold decision to return to my home country and embark on a new journey in the unfamiliar field of mink farming. Remarkably, within my first year as an entrepreneur, I achieved a significant milestone by earning more than 4 million yuan in revenue. Since then, I have dedicated myself to continuously exploring the intricacies of the mink farming industry and its interconnected value chain.

Through perseverance and strategic endeavors, our company's annual sales soared to over 13 million yuan by 2014. Today, I am proud to share that our company has successfully listed on the New Fourth Board in Qianhai, Shenzhen (Listing code: 681261). This listing is a testament to the growth and potential of our mink farming enterprise.
